title: Finite Topology And Metric-Ball Checks

solver_reuse.target: finite topology missing-empty-set Bool/CNF DRAT/LRAT regression seed
solver_reuse.pressure: Malformed finite topology row where the source open-set table omits the empty set even though the topology axioms require it.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional finite-topology rows only when they add distinct Boolean closure, metric-ball, preimage, or finite-set pressure; keep compactness, connectedness, continuity, and general topological-space facts in the Lean-horizon lane.

graduation_criteria: Encode finite topology membership and subset checks as deterministic Bool formulas.
Replay finite closure/interior witnesses through Axeyum model evaluation.
Encode finite metric-ball checks with exact LRA distance comparisons.
Emit checked finite counterexample evidence for rejected topology axiom claims; the bad empty-open row now has checked Bool/CNF DRAT/LRAT evidence.
Keep compactness, connectedness, continuity, and general topological-space facts marked Lean-horizon.
